system.notes:
Full Body Conversion (Chromebook 2). Whole-body cyborg chassis: takes Structural Damage per zone, not the human wound track - Head or Torso destroyed = the borg dies. SP 30 all zones; SDP disabled/destroyed = Head/limbs 25/35, Torso 35/45.

Option spaces: Head optic 1&1, audio 3; Torso 4; R.Arm 1/L.Arm 1; R.Leg 1/L.Leg 1.

Prebuilt options: cyberoptics + cyberaudio suite; leg holster; grenade storage; taser grips; black-book micro-computer; striptape dispenser; light bars.

loadout.name: Targeting Scope Optic
loadout.description: Targeting scope cyberoptic in a chassis optic socket. Split from the factory Cyberoptic Package (Targeting/Video/Thermo/Lowlite/AntiDazzle); the book's package HC 4 is carried on this item, its four package-mates list 0.

loadout.name: Video Camera Optic
loadout.description: Video camera cyberoptic in a chassis optic socket. Split from the factory Cyberoptic Package (package HC 4 carried on the Targeting Scope Optic).

loadout.name: Thermograph Optic
loadout.description: Thermographic cyberoptic in a chassis optic socket. Split from the factory Cyberoptic Package (package HC 4 carried on the Targeting Scope Optic).

loadout.name: Low-Lite Optic
loadout.description: Low-Lite cyberoptic in a chassis optic socket. Split from the factory Cyberoptic Package (package HC 4 carried on the Targeting Scope Optic).

loadout.name: Anti-Dazzle Optic
loadout.description: Anti-Dazzle cyberoptic in a chassis optic socket. Split from the factory Cyberoptic Package (package HC 4 carried on the Targeting Scope Optic).

loadout.name: Voice Stress Analyzer
loadout.description: Voice stress analyzer cyberaudio in a chassis audio socket. Split from the factory Cyberaudio Package (VSA/Radio/Digital Recorder); the book's package HC 3 is carried on this item, its two package-mates list 0.

loadout.name: Radio Link
loadout.description: Radio link cyberaudio in a chassis audio socket. Split from the factory Cyberaudio Package (package HC 3 carried on the Voice Stress Analyzer).

loadout.name: Digital Recorder
loadout.description: Digital recorder cyberaudio in a chassis audio socket. Split from the factory Cyberaudio Package (package HC 3 carried on the Voice Stress Analyzer).

loadout.name: Leg Holster (Right)
loadout.description: Concealed leg holster for storing a weapon.

loadout.name: Taser Grips (Right Arm)
loadout.description: Taser grips built into the hand to deliver a stunning electric shock.

loadout.name: Black Book Micro-Computer
loadout.description: Onboard Black Book micro-computer for data processing and storage.
